blended.narrative: Jiminy Peak is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 52°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
